steps.title: Modify the noun profile
steps.content: The blank comes after profile and before the phrase in the Navajo Times. It needs an adjective-like verb form that modifies the noun, as in a profile that appeared.

steps.title: Use a participle
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are finite verb forms, which cannot directly modify profile in this position. The participle correctly describes the published profile. The answer is A.
